description: Style NoteGrey is always in fashion which makes this T-shirt from spykar a must have in your wardrobe. Look simple yet trendy and enjoy hours of comfort in this tee. Team it up with a pair of denims and ballerinas for an on-trend look.  Product DetailsGrey round neck T-shirt, has short sleeves with gathering at the shoulders, print on the front and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% viscoseHand wash in cold water with mild detergentDry in shadeUse warm ironSize and FitRegular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M Style NoteGrey is always in fashion which makes this T-shirt from Spykar a must have in your wardrobe.
